entities.name: WEST AFRICA
entities.description: The geographical region in Africa where the study was conducted.

entities.name: SAHELIAN AND SUDANIAN CLIMATIC ZONES
entities.description: Specific climatic zones in West Africa analyzed for rainfall patterns.

entities.name: ONSET OF RAINS
entities.description: The date when the rainy season begins, used to predict growing season potential.

entities.name: GROWING SEASON LENGTH
entities.description: The total duration of the period suitable for crop growth.

entities.name: RAINFALL DATA ANALYSIS
entities.description: The analysis of long-term daily rainfall data to determine relationships between rain onset and season length.

entities.name: CROP AND DISASTER PLANNING
entities.description: The application of rainfall analysis to manage agricultural production and mitigate disaster risks.

entities.name: DROUGHT
entities.description: A condition of water deficiency that makes West Africa prone to disasters.
